name: Casey Nguyen
title: First-time user
blurb: Never used BRAHL before. Starts at sign-in, explores personas, adds a first challenge, learns Creator vs QA Hunter from the UI — no preloaded suite.

client_tasks.title: Land on sign-in page
client_tasks.detail: See all test personas; read fictional disclaimer.

client_tasks.title: Choose a profile card
client_tasks.detail: Click P9 (or any persona) to enter BRAHL Web.

client_tasks.title: Understand Creator avatar
client_tasks.detail: C = Creator — post challenges, budget, invite QA Hunter.

client_tasks.title: Empty state → Add challenge
client_tasks.detail: No challenge in top bar yet — click Add challenge to arena or use top bar when suites exist.

client_tasks.title: Follow getting-started checklist
client_tasks.detail: Refine with AI → purpose → Run Verify → BRAHL report.

client_tasks.title: Learn QA Hunter exists (read-only)
client_tasks.detail: H avatar may be dimmed for P9 — switch profile to P2/P3 to try QA Hunter later.

onboarding_hints: This is fictional test data — see Docs/test-user-data/
Switch profile anytime via the chip in the top bar
QA Hunter (H) is a separate role — try P2 or P3 when ready
